question: What court has jurisdiction over the Holloway estate matter?
What is the docket number for this estate matter?
Who serves as executor of the estate?
Who represents Eliza Yamamoto-Holloway?
Who is identified as the registrar at Northpoint Regional Museum?
Which section of the register contains the chronology of custody-affecting events?
Which section sets out the basis of V. Reeder's possession of items?
reference_answer: Section D.3 (Reeder-held items), corroborated by H.1 (Reeder's 2026-01-12 correspondence)

question: What is the title of item EX-001 and the year given for it?
According to the museum registrar's correspondence, what change did the 2024 amendment to NRM-LL-2020-02 effect?
reference_answer: It extended the loan period to 2027-09-30; it did not change the named lender

question: Which section of the register contains Court Order P-26-347-D?
reference_answer: Section E (Court Orders Affecting This Register)

question: What is the External ID for item EX-003?
At which SafeStore Vault box is item EX-010 held?
reference_answer: SafeStore Vault, Box V-402 (External ID SSV-V-402-A)

question: What is the Court Order identifier for the order granting L. Park observation access?
What is the Item ID assigned to the laptop "Holloway-MBP-2022"?
What is the motion number filed by D. Holloway on 2026-03-22?
What is the External ID for the letter collection (EX-009)?
What is the Court Order ID for the forensic handwriting analysis order?
On what date did Margaret W. Holloway die?
On what date were Letters Testamentary issued?
On what date was the codicil hearing originally calendared, and to what date was it rescheduled?
By what date is the forensic handwriting analyst's report due?
According to the chronology, on what date did the decedent depart for Lisbon?
What is the interval between the forensic report due date and the rescheduled codicil hearing date?
How many items are listed in the Section B inventory and custody register?
How many items in the register are held in physical custody by Northpoint Regional Museum?
How many items in the register have title status "Contested per codicil"?
Which items are held in physical custody by V. Reeder?
How many items in the register are held at SafeStore Vault?
Who has physical custody of EX-003?
Who claims title to EX-003 by virtue of an in-person gift, and on what asserted date?
reference_answer: Daniel Holloway, asserting an in-person gift on 2024-11-19

question: Who authorized L. Park's observation access to EX-004 and EX-010?
reference_answer: The Berwick County Probate Court, by Court Order P-26-347-D dated 2026-02-14

question: Over what category of EX-009 access does the executor have no authority to grant or revoke?
reference_answer: Reading-room patron access (governed by museum policy MRP-04, not subject to executor revocation)

question: For items EX-006, EX-007, and EX-008, which party currently has physical access?
reference_answer: Only V. Reeder has physical access; per Section D.3, no other party currently has access

question: Has the Court ruled on the validity of the 2024-09-12 handwritten note as a codicil?
reference_answer: No — the forensic analysis is pending (report due 2026-06-03) and the evidentiary hearing has been deferred to 2026-06-17

question: Has the Court ruled on Daniel Holloway's motion for declaratory ruling regarding EX-003?
reference_answer: No — Section D.2 states no ruling has issued on the motion for declaratory ruling

question: Does this register reproduce Margaret W. Holloway's last will and testament?
reference_answer: No — Section G lists the will (dated 2018-07-22) as referenced but not reproduced

question: As of the compilation date, has the executor directed delivery of EX-006, EX-007, or EX-008 to any party?
reference_answer: No — Section D.3 states the executor has not directed delivery, taking the position that the codicil dispute must be resolved first

question: Is the "private gift" assertion of D. Holloway regarding EX-003 recorded in this register as a finding of fact?
reference_answer: No — Section F states that reproduction does not constitute a finding of fact and that the assertion has not been ruled upon

question: What is the source given for the statement that the museum loan agreements name "the Estate of Margaret W. Holloway" as lender?
reference_answer: Section H.3, the museum registrar's (B. Caulfield) correspondence dated 2026-04-02, and the loan agreements themselves (referenced but not reproduced)

question: According to Section F, what sources are identified as authoritative for findings on the codicil dispute?
reference_answer: The forensic handwriting analyst's report (when filed) and the Court's ultimate rulings, per Section F
